ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "phase" INTEGER /* Phase of the trial (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "object" TEXT /* Type of object used in the trial (e.g., tool, animal) */,
  "to_shock" INTEGER /* Indicator if the subject was to be shocked (1 or 0) */,
  "seen_before" INTEGER /* Indicator if the object was seen before (1 or 0) */,
  "shocked_category" TEXT /* Category of shock response (e.g., tools) */,
  "response_side" INTEGER /* Side of response (e.g., left or right) */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the stimulus image */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the trial */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session in which the trial was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_phase FOREIGN KEY ("phase") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_object FOREIGN KEY ("object") REFERENCES objects ("object_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial from which the response was collected */,
  "num" INTEGER /* Number of the response */,
  "name" TEXT /* Participant's name or identifier */,
  "onset_fixation_cross" REAL /* Time of fixation cross onset */,
  "onset_stimulus" REAL /* Time of stimulus onset */,
  "inter_trial_time" REAL /* Time interval between trials */,
  "response" INTEGER /* Participant's response (e.g., correct or incorrect) */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time in seconds */,
  "was_shocked" INTEGER /* Indicator if the participant was shocked during the trial */,
  "button_pressed" INTEGER /* Button pressed by the participant */,
  "is_response_correct" INTEGER /* Indicator if the response was correct (1 or 0) */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who gave the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the response was recorded */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Level of confidence the participant had in their response (scale of 1-10) */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_was_shocked FOREIGN KEY ("was_shocked") REFERENCES shock_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_button_pressed FOREIGN KEY ("button_pressed") REFERENCES response_buttons ("button_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "participant_type" TEXT /* Type of participant (e.g., student, professional) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the participant */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Any relevant experience or background information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase (e.g., Phase 1, Phase 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the phase in minutes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object (e.g., tool, animal) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the object (e.g., tools) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the object */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the object */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shock_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shock category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the shock category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shock category */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the shock response (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the shock category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_buttons" (
  "button_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button */,
  "button_name" TEXT /* Name of the button */,
  "button_function" TEXT /* Functionality of the button */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the button (for visual differentiation) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the button */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("button_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., data entry, analysis) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the activity (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
